description: Executable replay-closure contract for carry-forward verification debt items #1-#5. Debt closes only when canonical replay commands are evidenced, raw artifact evidence links are recorded, and the verification gate contract remains satisfied.

closureContract: verification_gate.checkPostMergeArtifact must pass structural artifact checks
carry_forward_ledger.autoCloseVerifiedDebt must close only with replay-closure evidence links

items.title: Workers not including BOX_MERGED_SHA in done output
items.closureEvidence: ARTIFACT_GAP.MISSING_SHA constant emitted by collectArtifactGaps() when checkPostMergeArtifact().hasSha is false. validateWorkerContract() blocks done status with this gap for all roles with required evidence fields.
items.resolutionEvidence: replay-closure:v1 commands=[git rev-parse HEAD, git status --porcelain, npm test] links=[inline://post-merge-sha/33a762234d117e329528efa19a3087459d62db09, inline://clean-tree-status, inline://npm-test-output-block]

items.title: Workers not including ===NPM TEST OUTPUT START=== block in done output
items.closureEvidence: ARTIFACT_GAP.MISSING_TEST_OUTPUT constant emitted by collectArtifactGaps() when checkPostMergeArtifact().hasTestOutput is false. NPM_TEST_BLOCK_PATTERN regex requires both START and END markers with content.
items.resolutionEvidence: replay-closure:v1 commands=[git rev-parse HEAD, git status --porcelain, npm test] links=[inline://post-merge-sha/33a762234d117e329528efa19a3087459d62db09, inline://clean-tree-status, inline://npm-test-output-block]

items.title: Workers using node --test tests/** glob patterns instead of npm test
items.closureEvidence: FORBIDDEN_VERIFICATION_PATTERNS entry matches /node\s+--test\s+tests\/\*\*/ and similar glob patterns. checkForbiddenCommands() returns forbidden:true for these inputs. Dispatch validation rejects before execution.
items.resolutionEvidence: replay-closure:v1 commands=[git rev-parse HEAD, git status --porcelain, npm test] links=[inline://post-merge-sha/33a762234d117e329528efa19a3087459d62db09, inline://clean-tree-status, inline://npm-test-output-block]

items.title: Workers using bash/sh scripts instead of npm run commands
items.closureEvidence: FORBIDDEN_VERIFICATION_PATTERNS entry matches /\bbash\b/ and /\bsh\s+scripts/ patterns. checkForbiddenCommands() returns forbidden:true. VERIFICATION_CMD_REWRITE_RULES canonicalizes to npm equivalents where possible.
items.resolutionEvidence: replay-closure:v1 commands=[git rev-parse HEAD, git status --porcelain, npm test] links=[inline://post-merge-sha/33a762234d117e329528efa19a3087459d62db09, inline://clean-tree-status, inline://npm-test-output-block]

items.title: Workers using unfilled template placeholders (POST_MERGE_SHA_PLACEHOLDER, POST_MERGE_OUTPUT_PLACEHOLDER) in done output
items.closureEvidence: ALL_POST_MERGE_PLACEHOLDERS set checked by checkPostMergeArtifact(). hasUnfilledPlaceholder=true triggers ARTIFACT_GAP.UNFILLED_PLACEHOLDER via collectArtifactGaps(). validateWorkerContract() rejects done output containing any placeholder string.
items.resolutionEvidence: replay-closure:v1 commands=[git rev-parse HEAD, git status --porcelain, npm test] links=[inline://post-merge-sha/33a762234d117e329528efa19a3087459d62db09, inline://clean-tree-status, inline://npm-test-output-block]
